title: Airbnb (ABNB) Q1 2024 earnings
text: Airbnb revenue for Q1 reached $2.1 billion, an 18% increase year-over-year. Earnings per share was 41 cents vs. 24 cents expected. Net income for the quarter was $264 million, representing a net income margin of 12%. Free cash flow for Q1 was $1.9 billion, the highest ever, with trailing 12-month free cash flow of $4.2 billion representing a 41% margin. The company reported 132.6 million nights and experiences booked, up 9.5% from a year ago. Gross booking value was $22.9 billion in the first quarter. Active listings jumped 15% from a year earlier. Average daily rates increased 3% from a year ago to $173. Airbnb reported results that beat analyst estimates but offered weaker-than-expected guidance.
